docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KHODABAKHSH, AMIR AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF AMIR KHODABAKHSH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHODABAKHSH, AMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION NO EVIDENCE OF RETALIATION. PLAINTIFF MAY DISCUSS RENT PAYMENT PLAN WITH DEFENDANT PER THE TERMS OF THE 1-31-26 NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHODABAKHSH, AMIR

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
